author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor (PluginAction is the slash-command surface for plugins).

**Fix outline:** Replace the PluginAction enum (src/cli/repl/slash.rs:12) + handle_plugin_action match (around line 1100-1165) with a Tell-Don't-Ask trait. Each subcommand becomes a value implementing trait PluginCommand { fn execute(self, mgr: &mut PluginManager) -> Result<(), Error> }. The parser yields Box<dyn PluginCommand>; the dispatcher just calls .execute(). Adding a new subcommand only adds a new struct + impl, no central match edit.

**Partial progress:** Some adjacent slash-command infra has been incrementally tightened, but the PluginAction enum itself remains at 11 variants with the central dispatch match unchanged.

**Recommendation:** Owner-level call on (a) PluginCommand trait shape, (b) whether to do the same for other slash-command families at the same time. Defer.
